overall.description: Atmospheric nighttime scene of a foggy coastline featuring a silhouetted tall ship near rocky sea stacks, with driftwood scattered along the shoreline and mountains looming in the misty background. The footage appears to be rendered in a game engine with heavy teal color grading and cinematic lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: misty coastal beach with distant shipwreck view

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the foggy coastline and distant ship silhouette

entered.detail: silhouetted sailing ship with multiple masts anchored near rocky formations
tall rocky sea stacks emerging from the water near the ship
dark mountain silhouettes shrouded in heavy fog in the background
dense evergreen trees lining the left side of the beach
scattered weathered logs and branches along the sandy shore
dark wet sand covering the immediate foreground

segments.scene_description: A static cinematic shot of a foggy coastal beach at night, featuring a silhouetted tall ship near rocky sea stacks in the distance. Dense evergreen forest lines the left shore while driftwood scatters the dark sandy beach, all bathed in heavy teal-tinted fog with mountains looming in the background.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot presents a static, atmospheric view of a foggy coastline at night where the silhouettes of a ship and mountains emerge from a dense teal haze. It begins with a wide perspective of a dark sandy beach, where scattered driftwood leads the eye toward the water. As the gaze lingers, the heavy teal-tinted fog reveals the imposing shapes of rocky sea stacks and a silhouetted tall ship anchored in the distance. The scene remains anchored in this moody stillness, framed by a dense evergreen forest on the left and looming mountains that fade into the misty background.
